phrases.intent_en: Ask if the park is free to enter
phrases.cultural_note: The park itself is free and open to the public. The museums inside have separate entry fees.

responses.english: Yes, the park is free and open every day.
responses.phonetic: wee, luh park eh grah-TWEE ay oo-VAIR too lay ZHOOR
responses.french: Oui, le parc est gratuit et ouvert tous les jours.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des musées près du parc ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL day moo-ZAY preh doo park
phrases.cultural_note: The parc houses three major museums: the Royal Museum of Armed Forces, the Autoworld (classic cars), and the Museum of the Far East.

responses.english: Yes, three museums around the park. Tickets are separate.
responses.phonetic: wee, trwah myoo-ZAY oh-TOOR doo park. lay bee-YAY son say-pah-RAY
responses.french: Oui, trois musées autour du parc. Les billets sont séparés.

phrases.text_local: Que se passe-t-il le dimanche au parc ?
phrases.pronunciation: kuh suh pahs-TEEL luh dee-MONSH oh park
phrases.cultural_note: Sundays are popular — families play games on the lawns, inline skaters practice, and food trucks gather near the arch.

responses.english: On Sundays, families, picnics, and food trucks near the arch.
responses.phonetic: luh dee-MAHNSH, fah-MEE, peek-NEEK ay food truk preh duh lark
responses.french: Le dimanche, familles, pique-niques et food trucks près de l'arc.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the underground metro station
phrases.text_local: Quelle est la station de métro la plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah stah-SYOHN duh may-TROH lah ploo prosh
phrases.cultural_note: The parc is accessible via Metro 1 or 5 at the 'Merode' station. The Royal Museum of Armed Forces has its own metro entrance.

responses.english: Mérode station, lines 1 and 5. Five minutes on foot.
responses.phonetic: stah-SYON may-ROD, leen-yuh UHN ay SANK. ah sank mee-NOOT ah pyay
responses.french: Station Mérode, lignes un et cinq. À cinq minutes à pied.
